mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_collaborator (trip_id, member_id, role) VALUES (#{tripId}, #{memberId}, #{role})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM trip_collaborator WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, trip_id, member_id, role, invited_at FROM trip_collaborator WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY invited_at
SELECT id, trip_id, member_id, role, invited_at FROM trip_collaborator WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
